<noinclude>

Queries property by name equal to the first parameter value (without prefix) and displays its description text as an info tooltip.

The template will return nothing if target property page does not exist.

<pre>{{FieldTooltip|Host species}}</pre>

produces:

{{FieldTooltip|Host species}}

</noinclude><includeonly>{{#invoke:FieldTooltip|tooltip|{{{1|}}}}}</includeonly>
